user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch Cereal
fields.short_description: A classic, crunchy whole-grain cereal with a sweet cinnamon-sugar coating, served with cold milk.
fields.meal_suggestion: Pour a serving of Cinnamon Toast Crunch cereal into a bowl. Add cold milk of choice (dairy or plant-based). For a more balanced meal, serve alongside a small side of fresh fruit like sliced strawberries or a hard-boiled egg.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides quick carbohydrates for energy and is fortified with vitamins and minerals. Pairing with milk adds protein and calcium. Best enjoyed occasionally as part of a varied diet.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position -1 appends the requested cereal to the end of the existing breakfast list for the child's first day. This adds a familiar, kid-friendly option to the more gourmet choices already present.
